name: Khoros Marketing
description:
Khoros Marketing is built for large enterprises. With robust tools for managing social media, customer care, and online communities, it’s loved for its scalability, comprehensive analytics, and ability to integrate with other business systems. 

Here’s what makes it special:

  • Because Khoros is built for enterprises (and meant to scale), it mainly offers custom pricing based on the scale and features required
  • Khoros offers scalable social media management. Whether your team has 20 people or 200, you can easily manage complex social media operations across teams.
  • Advanced analytics offer deep insights into audience behavior and campaign performance
  • Enjoy integrated customer care, and combine social media management with customer service to boost brand loyalty and build a reputation for customer obsession
  • Supported platforms include major social media platforms (like Facebook, Instagram, X, and LinkedIn) and online communities

Key Features:

✅  Multi-team management

✅  Comprehensive analytics

✅  Integrated customer service
what_people_say:
What people say :

Enterprises, meet your new favorite tool. With flexible plans, custom pricing, and collaboration tools that make teamwork a breeze, Khoros is perfect for large teams looking to grow. Users particularly love its focus on improving customer engagement and brand loyalty, which can be a hard code to crack for any brand!

Here’s what customers say:

“Khoros is perfect for our large-scale operations. We’re happy to pay the price. Worth it for sure.” 

“It’s powerful for managing customer interactions, but it took ages to learn how to use it. For such an expensive tool, I would expect more hand-holding through the process. Maybe we should’ve asked, but nobody really reached out to us to see how it was going. We just had to soldier on and hope for the best.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Simpler user interface
  • 🚫 Affordable options for smaller organizations
  • 🚫 Content creation assistance
  • 🚫 Easier integration with existing business systems
